new_terms.context: The name of Anthropic's AI-powered code generation product, central to this article.
A key concept described as the future of how AI will function. The existing term 'agentic' (智能体化) is the adjectival form.
The name of the AI lab that created Claude. A key entity in the article.
The name of the main competitor to Anthropic mentioned in the article.
Abbreviation for Annual Recurring Revenue, a key financial metric used to compare Anthropic and OpenAI's growth.
The name of AWS's custom AI accelerator chip (mentioned as Trainium2/3).
Name of a cloud provider specializing in GPU infrastructure, mentioned in relation to OpenAI's data center delays.
Abbreviation for Amazon Web Services, mentioned as a key cloud partner.
